data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value: select sc_mem_data_date.balance , '' as sum_balanace, '' as member_group_control, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_sharestock(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as share_stock, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sysdate , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as sysdate_tdate , pka_com_function.fp_get_coopname() as coop_name, '!adtm_edate_1!' as adtm_edate, '!adtm_data_1!' as adtm_data, '!adtm_return_1!' as adtm_return, '!adtm_appointment_1!' as adtm_appointment, (select manager_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as manager_name from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_data_date , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where 1 = 2 --( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_data_date.membership_no ) --and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) --and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) --and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' ) --and sc_mem_data_date.sys_coop = 'SHR' /*WHERE*/ --and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no between '012001' and '012001' )
